repository.name: nanoclaw-todo-agent

commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(nodes): add Free-Tier provisioning mode for AWS accounts with instance restrictions

Adds a new [4] Free-Tier option to the node provisioning priority in both
the terminal TUI and web UI. Uses only free-tier eligible instance families
(m7i-flex, c7i-flex, t3, t3a, t4g) on on-demand — suitable for AWS accounts
that restrict non-free-tier instance types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Major overhaul: source node, numeric inputs, material flow, and engine fixes

- Fix calculator bug: apply conversionRatio in cumYieldToEnd so throughput displays in output units
- Add NumericInput component with free-form typing (backspace-to-clear works correctly)
- Replace all number inputs across Dashboard, Departments, Resources, Scenarios with NumericInput
- Overhaul source node in ProcessBuilder: single material selector, supply mode toggle (unlimited/fixed), fixed supply config with e/h preview, KPI block, delete footer (disabled when last source)
- Propagate source material downstream via BFS resolveFlowMaterials
- Support multiple source nodes (validator relaxed from =1 to >=1)
- Engine: fixed-supply sources generate synthetic StepResult entries as bottleneck candidates
- Add regression test for conversionRatio=5 throughput calculation

Initial commit: Custom JotForm Repeating List Widget

Self-contained widget for JotForm with repeating data rows supporting:
- 10 field types (text, email, url, number, date, time, dropdown, radio, checkbox, textarea)
- Custom input mask engine with presets (phone, SSN, ZIP, date, time)
- Cross-row dropdown selection limits with live indicators
- Format validation (email, URL, phone, date, number, regex)
- Single-line (table) and multi-line (card) responsive layouts
- Build script inlines all CSS/JS into single HTML for JotForm deployment
- Test harness with mock JFCustomWidget API and preset configurations

fix: pass TokenTracker-wrapped client to slide insertion API calls (#4)

slide_insertion.py was creating its own bare anthropic.Anthropic client,
bypassing the TokenTracker wrapper. Slide insertion API costs were
invisible in the run manifest.

- Change analyze_supplemental_content() and _call_claude() to accept a
  client object instead of api_key string
- Update pipeline.py call site to pass the existing TokenTracker-wrapped client
- Update test to use mock client instead of api_key string

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(PYR-70): add sign-out button to ProfileView (#38)

Adds a destructive "Sign Out" button at the bottom of ProfileView. Tapping
it calls AuthService.signOut(), then clears AppState.session, which causes
RootView to navigate back to AuthView automatically.

Also introduces ProfileViewModel to own sign-out logic and error state,
keeping the View as layout-only per MVVM rules. Adds docs/agent-coordination.md.

Co-authored-by: JakeCox90 <jake.cox2@news.co.uk>

fix: guard against concurrent CMED/ANVISA refreshes in scheduleRefreshes

Add isRefreshing flags to prevent runaway loop when setInterval fires
faster than expected (e.g. due to int32 timer overflow edge case).
Also reset day counters before async work to avoid double-trigger.
Fix .gitignore pattern /data/ to not exclude src/data/ directory.

commit.message:
Fix issues from 2-week production debug log analysis (#392)

* fix: resolve debug log issues from 2-week production analysis

- Fix de-jitter timestamp runaway drift in WeightProcessor (non-batched: +1ms monotonicity instead of full interval; batched: cap synthetic to 2 intervals ahead of wall-clock)
- Fix ShotGraph binding loop by caching plotWidth imperatively with 1px dead zone
- Fix ShotDetailPage undefined-to-bool warnings with explicit undefined checks
- Fix UpdateChecker double-install intent by tracking actual app backgrounding
- Add SAW diagnostic logging (LSLR window details, flow-became-valid transition)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address code review feedback on debug log fixes

- Reset m_flowBecameValidLogged in resetForRetare() so the diagnostic
  log fires again after mid-shot auto-retare
- Fix install guard getting permanently stuck when Android install dialog
  dismisses without backgrounding the app (overlay scenario): detect
  stale guard in downloadAndInstall() and clear it on explicit user retry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: reset log throttle timestamps in resetForRetare()

Ensures diagnostic logs (tare warning, low flow) aren't suppressed
for up to 5s after a mid-shot auto-retare, matching startExtraction().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: Add system architecture with action agent and phased implementation roadmap

- System architecture: Dev-Nexus (discovery), Action-Agent (remediation), Frontend, External agents
- Service-oriented architecture (SOA) with clear separation of concerns
- Phase 1: Create action-agent service, implement terraform and langsmith skills
- Phase 2: Consolidate pattern-miner and dependency-orchestrator into core services
- All references use PostgreSQL (removed deprecated JSON KB)
- Frontend auto-discovers skills via A2A manifest endpoints
- Multi-repo workflow: skills decoupled from frontend deployment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(ui): replace fake Operations panels with Grafana embeds (CAB-1766) (#1632)

## Summary

- **Replace fake StatCards** (Error Rate=0, P95=0, RPS=0, Alerts=0) with
real Grafana panel embeds from `stoa-slo-dashboard` and
`stoa-incident-response` dashboards
- **Add RBAC gating**: Traffic & Security section visible only to
`cpi-admin` and `devops` roles; SLO Overview, Platform Health,
Deployments, and Quick Links visible to all authenticated users
- **New `GrafanaPanel` component**: reusable iframe embed with
`useServiceHealth` availability detection and `ServiceUnavailable`
fallback
- **Fix `ARGOCD_PLATFORM_APPS`**: expand from just `stoa-gateway` to all
4 components
(`stoa-gateway,control-plane-api,control-plane-ui,stoa-portal`)
- **Fix Prometheus recording rules**: align query names in
`operations.py` with actual `stoa-slo.yaml` rules
(`slo:api_availability:ratio`, `slo:api_latency_p95:seconds`, etc.)
- **Replace raw Prometheus link** with 6 specific Grafana dashboard
links (SLO, Incidents, Fleet, Arena, Platform Health, Logs)

## Files changed

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `control-plane-ui/src/components/GrafanaPanel.tsx` | New reusable
Grafana embed component |
| `control-plane-ui/src/config.ts` | Add `panels` + `dashboards` config
for Grafana |
| `control-plane-ui/src/pages/Operations/OperationsDashboard.tsx` | Full
refonte — Grafana embeds + RBAC |
| `control-plane-ui/src/pages/Operations/OperationsDashboard.test.tsx` |
Updated tests (RBAC personas, new sections) |
| `control-plane-api/src/config.py` | Fix `ARGOCD_PLATFORM_APPS` |
| `control-plane-api/src/routers/operations.py` | Fix recording rule
names |

## RBAC matrix

| Section | cpi-admin | tenant-admin | devops | viewer |
|---------|-----------|-------------|--------|--------|
| SLO Overview (4 gauges) | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Platform Health (ArgoCD) | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Recent Deployments | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Quick Links | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Traffic & Security | Yes | No | Yes | No |

## Test plan

- [x] ESLint: 104/105 warnings (under budget)
- [x] Prettier: all files pass
- [x] tsc: no errors in changed files
- [x] ruff: Python files pass
- [x] lint-staged pre-commit: all checks pass
- [ ] CI green (3 required checks)
- [ ] Visual: Grafana panels render real data on
`console.gostoa.dev/operations`
- [ ] RBAC: viewer/tenant-admin cannot see Traffic & Security section

> Council validation: 8.50/10 (Go) — CAB-1766

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Add WT-219: 古典立体摄影术 (Stereoscopy)

探索19世纪维多利亚时代的3D摄影技术，分析其从风靡一时到衰落的技术和社会原因，以及对现代VR/AR技术的启发。

- 技术简史：查尔斯·惠斯通1838年发明立体镜原理
- 枯萎原因：电影电视兴起、View-Master替代、真彩色摄影普及
- 当代启发：现代3D电影、VR/AR技术的先驱原理
- 设计哲学："专用设备"的普及困境

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite P&L by Lab: brand-name matching on total P&L (no class filter)

Drop class-ID approach in favor of fetching the full unfiltered P&L once
and classifying each line item by checking for lab brand keywords in
account/section names (civille, truss, awesome, lincoln, apps).

Key rules:
- When a Section's header or Summary matches a lab brand, use the Section
  Summary as the single authoritative total — do not recurse into children.
  This prevents double-counting (e.g. "Total Civille" already includes
  Phantom Copy; listing Phantom Copy separately would double-count).
- Individual Data rows are also matched by name for items that appear
  outside named sections.
- One QBO API call per page load (vs. 5+ calls with class filtering).

commit.message:
🐛 Fix unsupported `as` value in video preload links

`as="video"` is not a valid value for `<link rel="preload">`, causing
browsers to ignore the preload entirely. Changed to `as="fetch"`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix iOS modal freeze on New Task screen (#163)

* Rename 'Mohs Audit Executor' to 'Audit Executor' in DB Tools panel

* Fix iOS modal freeze: remove nested overflow-y:auto on modal overlay, add touch-action:manipulation to date buttons

Double scrollable container (modal + modal-content both had overflow-y:auto
+ -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch) caused iOS Safari to freeze touch events.
Fix: outer modal uses overflow-y:hidden; inner modal-content keeps its own scroll.
Also adds touch-action:manipulation to reminder date buttons to eliminate 300ms delay.

commit.message:
fix: suppress AE modal dialogs during batch thumbnail generation on Windows

saveFrameToPng on Windows shows blocking "Could not create file" dialogs
instead of throwing catchable errors, halting the entire batch. Wrap
generatePreviewsToDisk with app.beginSuppressDialogs/endSuppressDialogs
so failures are handled gracefully by existing file-existence checks.

- Filter GB-parsed series candidates that are edition notes

  keyword blocklist, so only real series names get through

commit.message:
Fix blank cart items when add-book API call fails

Previously, if the API returned an error, the error object was silently

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Firebase backend for drone operator job board

Firebase setup:
- lib/firebase/client.ts — browser SDK (auth + Firestore)
- lib/firebase/admin.ts — server-side Admin SDK
- lib/firebase/auth-context.tsx — useAuth() hook via AuthProvider
- lib/firebase/jobs.ts — client-side Firestore CRUD, 30-day auto-expiry
- lib/firebase/jobs-server.ts — server-side job fetch via Admin SDK

API routes:
- POST /api/jobs — create job (requires Firebase auth token)
- GET /api/jobs — public listing with type/locale filters
- GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/jobs/[id] — owner-only edit/delete

Auth pages:
- /[locale]/auth/login — Google + email/password
- /[locale]/auth/register — name + email + password + Google

Job posting form:
- /[locale]/jobs/new — protected, redirects to login if unauthenticated
- City dropdown with 12 zachodniopomorskie cities + coordinates
- Services, drone types, licenses, radius, rate fields

Jobs page wired to real Firestore (falls back to mock data if empty)
Firestore security rules (firestore.rules)
AuthProvider wraps layout
.gitignore: exclude Firebase service account JSON

commit.message:
Recycle ONNX session every 60 inference cycles to cap WASM heap

WASM linear memory can only grow, never shrink. Periodic session
recycling (release + recreate) prevents heap fragmentation from
accumulating over long listening sessions. Model is browser-cached
so recreation is near-instant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Use Google Books to verify language for OL editions missing language metadata

Instead of guessing via title script detection, editions that Open Library
hasn't tagged with a language are now cross-referenced against Google Books
by ISBN (up to 40 in parallel, cached 24h). Google Books has reliable
`volumeInfo.language` data. Editions are included if GB confirms the right
language or has no data; editions GB explicitly identifies as a different
language are filtered out.
